search.query: index=suricata sourcetype=syslog suricata | timechart count by process span=1m
index=suricata sourcetype=syslog suricata | rex field=_raw "{\w+}\s+(?<src_ip>\d+\.\d+\.\d+\.\d+)" | stats count by src_ip | sort -count | head 10
index=suricata sourcetype=syslog suricata | rex field=_raw "\[Priority:\s+(?P<priority>\d+)\]" | where isnotnull(priority) AND priority!="0" | timechart count by priority span=5m
index=suricata sourcetype=syslog suricata NOT "TEST ICMP" NOT "invalid checksum" | rex field=_raw "\]\s+(?P<alert_msg>[^\[]+)\s+\[" | stats count by alert_msg | sort -count

index=suricata sourcetype=syslog suricata | rex field=_raw "{\w+}\s+(?<src_ip>\d+\.\d+\.\d+\.\d+)" | rex field=_raw "\[Priority:\s+(?<priority>\d+)\]" | rex field=_raw "\]\s+(?<alert_msg>[^\[]+)\s+\[" | table _time src_ip alert_msg priority | sort -_time | head 20
